insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every great achievement starts with a single step, and by completing your first session, you'll not only earn your first points, but also gain valuable insights into your strengths and areas for improvement. By focusing on building a daily habit of learning, even just 10-15 minutes a day, you can quickly turn your 0-day streak into a meaningful momentum that will propel you towards achieving your academic goals.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
